task_completion.description: Log in to LibreHealth EHR as 'admin'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreHealth EHR dashboard is visible, indicating a successful login, ideally showing the user 'admin' in the top right or user menu.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Patient Demographics layout customization screen
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Layout editor screen is open, specifically showing the 'Demographics' (or 'DEM') form layout.
A new group, section, or tab titled 'RPM' is visible in the layout editor list.

task_completion.description: Add a field with ID 'rpm_device_serial' and Title 'Device Serial Number'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A field entry is visible within the 'RPM' group showing the ID 'rpm_device_serial' and the Title/Label 'Device Serial Number'.

task_completion.description: Set the field as a text field with a size of 20
task_completion.visual_evidence: The properties for the 'Device Serial Number' field show the Data Type set to 'Text' (or '1') and the Size attribute set to '20'.
A success message indicating the layout was saved, or the final layout screen shows the new RPM group and field fully registered in the system without unsaved indicators.

integrity.description: Agent used the LibreHealth EHR web interface to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Changes were made through the browser's layout editor UI, not via direct database queries or terminal scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual LibreHealth EHR application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar and page layout match a genuine LibreHealth EHR instance, not a local text editor or mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the UI using MySQL commands
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing MySQL `INSERT` or `UPDATE` commands targeting the `layout_options` table.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target form is the Demographics layout (form_id: 'DEM'). The expected group title is 'RPM'. The new field must have ID 'rpm_device_serial', Title 'Device Serial Number', Data Type '1' (which corresponds to 'Text' in LibreHealth EHR), and Size '20'.
